checkin.journal:
1. I was fucking nervous in the morning. I was repeating my speech in bed. I did Duolingo as well. 
2. I had breakfast, and I just didn't feel it. Also, I was under the weather. 
3. I was having a call with Alex helping me to relax
4. I fucking delivered this speech - it was slightly terrifying, but I did it, so whew, well done. 
5. I kept having that feeling that people didn't like this speech. But hey. Bit too much Marcus Aurelius. 
6. Playing ping pong with Olle, lunch with Olle. 
7. Spend so

supplements_list.name: mg glycinate 1 capsule (probably wont take it more)
